description: Create a professional B2B product strategy survey in LimeSurvey titled 'SaaS Pricing Strategy 2026' (Credentials: admin / Admin123!). The survey must include a question group named 'Pricing & Features' containing two specific questions. The first question (Code: PREF, Type: List (Radio)) must feature an HTML table in the question text comparing three tiers: Starter ($29/mo, 1 User), Pro ($79/mo, 5 Users), and Enterprise (Custom, Unlimited), with answer options 'Starter Tier', 'Pro Tier', and 'Enterprise Tier'. The second question (Code: INTEG, Type: Multiple choice) must ask 'Which integrations are essential?' with answer options 'Salesforce', 'Slack', 'HubSpot', and 'No integrations needed'. The 'No integrations needed' option must be configured as an exclusive option.
